about.metaDescription: L'Île Host is Mauritius's premium marketplace connecting event planners with the island's best service providers — photographers, caterers, venues, and more.
about.heroSubtitle: L'Île Host is the island's first premium marketplace dedicated to connecting event organizers with the finest local service providers — from intimate beach weddings to large corporate galas.
about.missionP1: Planning an event in Mauritius is a beautiful undertaking, but finding the right professionals can be overwhelming. L'Île Host was created to solve that problem — bringing together the very best photographers, caterers, floral designers, musicians, venues, and event planners in one trusted directory.
about.missionP2: We believe that every event — whether a wedding on the beach, a corporate gathering in Port Louis, or a birthday celebration in Grand Baie — deserves world-class service delivered by people who truly understand the island.

quality.title: Curated Quality
quality.desc: Every provider on our platform is manually reviewed to ensure they meet our quality standards.

local.title: Local Expertise
local.desc: We exclusively feature professionals who know the Mauritian landscape, culture, and venues intimately.

direct.title: Direct Connection
direct.desc: We connect you directly with providers — no middlemen, no hidden fees.

mobile.title: Mobile-First
mobile.desc: Built from the ground up for mobile users, because that's how Mauritius browses.

about.ctaTitle: Ready to find your perfect provider?
about.ctaSubtitle: Browse our curated selection of Mauritius event professionals.

cgu.metaDescription: General Terms of Use for the L'Île Host platform.
cgu.title: Terms of Use
cgu.s1p: Welcome to L'Île Host ("the Platform"). By accessing or using our website at ilehost.mu, you agree to comply with and be bound by these General Terms of Use. Please read them carefully before using the Platform.
cgu.s2p: L'Île Host is an online directory and marketplace connecting individuals and organizations planning events in Mauritius with local service providers (photographers, caterers, venues, etc.). The Platform facilitates introductions but is not a party to any agreement made between users and providers.
cgu.s3l1: You must be at least 18 years of age to use this Platform.
cgu.s3l2: You agree not to use the Platform for any unlawful purpose or in any way that could damage, disable, or impair the service.
cgu.s3l3: You must not attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Platform.
cgu.s3l4: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of any account credentials you create.
cgu.s4p: Service provider profiles are created and managed by L'Île Host's editorial team during Phase 1. All information is provided in good faith. L'Île Host does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or quality of provider information and disclaims any liability for agreements made between users and providers.
cgu.s5p: All content on the Platform — including text, images, logos, and design — is the property of L'Île Host or its licensors and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without prior written consent.
cgu.s6p: L'Île Host provides the Platform "as is" without warranties of any kind. We shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Platform or your interactions with any service provider.
cgu.s7p: L'Île Host reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
cgu.s8p: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Mauritius. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Mauritius.
cgu.s9p: For questions about these Terms, please contact us at

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for the L'Île Host platform — how we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1p: L'Île Host ("we", "us", "our") operates the event services marketplace at ilehost.mu. We are committed to protecting your personal data and respecting your privacy.
privacy.s2intro: We may collect the following types of personal data:
privacy.s2l1: Contact data: Name, email address, and phone number when you submit a contact form or enquiry.
privacy.s2l2: Usage data: Pages visited, time spent on the site, browser type, and IP address (via analytics tools).
privacy.s2l3: Communication data: Messages you send through contact forms.
privacy.s3l1: To respond to your enquiries and contact form submissions.
privacy.s3l2: To improve the Platform based on usage analytics.
privacy.s3l3: To send you relevant updates (only if you opt in).
privacy.s3l4: To maintain platform security and prevent abuse.
privacy.s4p: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors use our Platform. This tool may set cookies on your device. You can opt out of Google Analytics by installing the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.
privacy.s5p: We do not sell or rent your personal data to third parties. We may share data with trusted service providers (such as hosting and analytics platforms) who process data on our behalf under appropriate data protection agreements.
privacy.s6p: We retain personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by law.
privacy.s7l1: Access the personal data we hold about you.
privacy.s7l4: Object to the processing of your data.
privacy.s7contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.s8p: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy.s9p: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by posting the updated policy on this page with a new "Last updated" date.

mentions.metaDescription: Legal notices and company information for L'Île Host.
mentions.title: Legal Notices
mentions.ipP: The entire content of this website — including but not limited to text, photographs, videos, graphics, logos, and icons — is the exclusive property of L'Île Host unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication, or transmission of any or all of the content of this website, in any form whatsoever, is prohibited without the prior written authorization of L'Île Host.
mentions.liabP: L'Île Host strives to provide accurate information on this website. However, we cannot guarantee that all information is always up-to-date, complete, or error-free. L'Île Host disclaims all liability for any direct or indirect damages that may result from accessing or using this website.
mentions.lawP: This website is governed by the laws of the Republic of Mauritius. Any disputes relating to the use of this website shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Mauritius.
mentions.contactP: For any enquiries regarding these legal notices, please contact us at
